seoTitle: Balmain vs Balmain East — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Balmain and Balmain East. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Balmain vs Balmain East: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Balmain and Balmain East.
heading: Balmain vs Balmain East — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Balmain, New South Wales and Balmain East, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Balmain has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to Balmain East (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Balmain or Balmain East safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Balmain has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Balmain East scores 59/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Balmain scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Balmain East scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Balmain or Balmain East?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Balmain has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
